overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a neon-lit futuristic city street. The player passes a magazine vendor stand and various pedestrians while exploring the dense urban environment with towering buildings, holographic advertisements, and futuristic vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk with magazine vendor stand

events.description: futuristic white car drives past on the street to the left

agents.ego_description: walking slowly past a magazine stand examining the colorful cyberpunk magazine covers

notable_agents.action: person with blue hair leaning on green railing watching traffic

entered.detail: metal rack displaying colorful cyberpunk magazines and posters with vivid covers
green metal railing separating sidewalk from the multi-lane street
green neon sign for Hydro Subdermal clinic glowing against dark building

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a covered city sidewalk with a prominent magazine stand displaying cyberpunk-style publications. A person with blue hair leans on the railing to the right, watching traffic. The camera moves forward past the stand while a futuristic white car passes on the street, with neon signs visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sidewalk approaching gun store intersection

events.description: red sports car drives past on the street

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past the vendor area toward the gun store signage

notable_agents.action: person with blue hair still leaning on railing as camera passes by

entered.detail: blue cylindrical trash can overflowing with garbage scattered on the ground around it
large red and blue neon sign reading RIFLES & PISTOLS on building facade
red street sign for Skyline North mounted on pole

segments.scene_description: Moving past the magazine stand, the camera proceeds along the sidewalk passing a blue trash can and the person with blue hair. The gun store sign becomes prominent in the distance while a red sports car drives by. The environment remains under building overhangs with mixed neon and natural lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial plaza with gun store and parking garage entrance

events.description: camera passes group of three pedestrians walking in opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking through the commercial plaza area passing pedestrians and approaching the parking entrance

notable_agents.action: group of three pedestrians walking together toward the camera

entered.detail: large rectangular concrete planter containing a tree and greenery
green neon parking sign indicating garage entrance
multiple holographic advertisements and video screens on building facades

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wider commercial plaza with the gun store sign now to the left. The camera passes a group of pedestrians and a large concrete planter with a tree. Digital billboards and holographic advertisements cover the towering buildings ahead, while a parking garage entrance appears on the right. The area becomes more exposed to direct sunlight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sheltered city sidewalk into a wide, sunlit commercial plaza. It begins under building overhangs, gliding past a magazine stand filled with cyberpunk publications and a blue-haired person leaning on a railing as a white futuristic car passes by. As the camera proceeds along the sidewalk, it moves past a blue trash can and a speeding red sports car, with a gun store sign becoming increasingly prominent in the distance. The scene then opens into a broader urban space, shifting from the dim neon lighting of the covered walkway to direct sunlight. Finally, the camera passes a group of pedestrians and a concrete planter, revealing towering buildings adorned with holographic advertisements and a parking garage entrance to the right.
